reminders.clothing: Casual comfy clothing for the long drive.

timeline.title: Landing at Colombo Airport
timeline.desc: Arrive at Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB) and meet the tour coordinator.

timeline.title: Private Transit to Sigiriya
timeline.desc: Embark on a scenic 4-hour drive to the Cultural Triangle in our private coach.

timeline.title: Hotel Check-in
timeline.desc: Welcome drinks and check-in at the luxurious Liyya Water Villas in Sigiriya.

timeline.title: Welcome Dinner
timeline.desc: Fresh, welcoming coastal and local elements served at Hotel Sigiriya to kick off the adventure.

culinary.concept: Fresh, welcoming coastal and local elements after the drive.

sections.name: Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Black Sesame-Crumbed Red Mullet: Fresh red mullet fillets coated in flour, egg, and black sesame seeds, shallow-fried and served with rich tartar sauce.
Sea Bass 'En Papillote' (Skillet-Style): White fish fillet slow-cooked in a sealed parchment pouch on the stove with olive oil, garlic, and fresh broccoli.
Premium Agedashi Tofu: Large firm tofu cubes fried glass-crisp, served floating in a hot, reduced soy, cooking sake, and sesame oil broth.

sections.name: Sides (Choose 2)
items: Shoestring Pommes Frites: Thin, hand-cut potato fries pan-fried to order in clean sunflower oil until shattering crisp.
Aromatic Coconut Rice: Fluffy long-grain white rice steamed in diluted coconut milk with mustard seeds.
Garlic-Herb Tossed Pasta: Short Italian pasta sautéed in extra virgin olive oil, golden toasted garlic slivers, and dried herbs.

sections.name: Salad (Choose 1)
items: Sautéed Mushroom Salad: Skillet-seared fresh whole mushrooms and broccoli tossed hot with raw cherry tomatoes and garlic.
Tropical Mango & Avocado Salad: Cubes of fresh local mango, tree-ripened avocado, red onion, and fresh coriander with olive oil & lime juice.
Charred Skillet Veggies: Slices of sweet potato, sweet bell peppers, and onions seared on a hot skillet for a deep, smoky flavor.

reminders.clothing: 🥻 Bring a Sarong/modest clothing covering shoulders and knees for the Village Tour.
reminders.footwear: 👟 Hiking shoes required for the morning Sigiriya Rock climb.

timeline.title: Sigiriya Rock Sunrise Hike
timeline.desc: Guided early climb to ascend the rock fortress for cooler climbing temperatures and jungle sunrise views.

timeline.title: Breakfast & Lunch Packing
timeline.desc: Enjoy breakfast and self-pack a high-protein lunch box for today's excursions.

timeline.title: Authentic Village Tour
timeline.desc: Immersive exploration of village life, local farming, and lake catamarans.

timeline.title: Wildlife Elephant Safari
timeline.desc: 4x4 open-jeep safari through Minneriya/Kaudulla national reserve to view gathering wild elephant herds.

timeline.title: Dinner at Liyya Water Villas
timeline.desc: Vibrant Pacific Rim flavors served poolside at the hotel.

culinary.concept: High-protein morning energy for the rock climb and vibrant Pacific Rim flavors at night.

sections.name: Breakfast Main Course (Choose 1)
items: French Mushroom Omelette: Silky, golden omelette rolled with butter-sautéed mushrooms, boasting a soft, warm cream cheese center.
Fluffy Soufflé Pancakes: Extra-airy pancakes served with an organic butter melting slab and a sweet strawberry jam reduction.
Garlic Confit Poached Eggs: Runny poached eggs served over thick artisan bread brushed with extra virgin olive oil and sweet melted garlic cloves.

sections.name: Breakfast Sides (Choose 2)
items: Stuffed Avocado Boats: Half-avocados filled to the brim with micro-diced cherry tomatoes, extra virgin olive oil, and coarse sea salt.
Crisp Veggie Crudités: Crisp hand-cut carrot, sweet bell pepper, and cucumber batons served alongside an organic cream cheese spread.
Coconut Oatmeal Porridge: Small bowl of warm rolled oats simmered in freshly squeezed coconut milk, pure honey, and real vanilla bean extract.

sections.name: Breakfast Salad (Choose 1)
items: Tropical Red Berry Salad: Sliced banana, ripe papaya, and sweet raisins tossed in a fresh strawberry-lime glaze.
A Gardener's Love Salad: Crisp lettuce, cabbage, carrots, green cucumber, tomato, onion, and bell pepper with French dressing.
Tahini-Drizzled Trio: Diced vine-ripened tomatoes, dill pickles, and sweet bell peppers topped with a heavy pour of raw sesame tahini.

sections.name: Self-Packing Lunch Options
items: Coastal Tuna/Salmon Ceviche (Raw Dish): Cubes of fresh raw yellowfin tuna cured instantly in sharp lime juice, cold-pressed olive oil, red onion, and coriander.
Crispy Seared Teriyaki Tofu: Firm tofu slabs pan-fried until deeply golden, glazed with a sweet teriyaki and soy reduction.
Assorted Bread Spread: Freshly sliced breads, wheat tortillas, and flatbreads.
Fresh Veggie Packing Bar: Whole crisp lettuce leaves (for wrappers), firm avocado slices, red onion rings, and sweet bell pepper strips.

sections.name: Dinner Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Seared Yellowfin Tuna Steak: Tuna heavily coated with cracked black pepper, seared exactly 1-2 minutes per side for a rare center, served with wild orange glaze.
Yellow Fin Tuna with Cauliflower Gratin: Pan-seared tuna steak served alongside a baked, cheesy cauliflower gratin and salsa verde.
Pan-Seared Sea Bass in Lime Butter: Fresh sea bass fillet seared in hot olive oil, finished with a reduction of real butter and sharp lime juice.

sections.name: Dinner Sides (Choose 2)
items: Silk Mashed Potatoes: Velvet-smooth mashed regular potatoes whipped with hot milk and a generous amount of real butter.
Coconut-Steamed Rice: Aromatic white rice steamed with pure coconut cream for a rich, delicate fragrance.
Blistered Sweet Potato Medallions: Sweet potato discs pan-fried in extra virgin olive oil with crispy, golden garlic chips.

sections.name: Dinner Salad (Choose 1)
items: Blistered Cherry Tomato Salad: Skillet-charred cherry tomatoes and sweet bell peppers tossed hot with raw purple onion and olive oil.
Thai-Style Mango Salad: Julienne of semi-ripe mango, fresh local cucumber, green onions, and crushed roasted peanuts with sesame oil.
Greek Salad: Large chunks of green lettuce, black and green olives, bell pepper, onion, tomato, and cucumber topped with feta and dried oregano.

reminders.clothing: 💦 Water sports: Bring a dry change of clothes. 🧥 Temperature drop notice: Nuwara Eliya gets cold at night (around 14°C), pack a warm fleece/sweater!
reminders.footwear: 👟 Water shoes required for rafting and canyoning. Hiking boots/sneakers for the morning.

timeline.title: Sunrise Hike & Morning Yoga
timeline.desc: A refreshing outdoor yoga session to energize for the adventure-filled day.

timeline.title: Breakfast & Checkout
timeline.desc: Enjoy breakfast and self-pack a lunch box before departing Sigiriya.

timeline.title: Rafting & Canyoning in Kithulgala
timeline.desc: Thrilling whitewater rafting and sliding down natural rainforest rock canyons.

timeline.title: Drive to Nuwara Eliya
timeline.desc: Winding drive through cascading tea valleys into the cold mountain air.

timeline.title: Cozy Highland Dinner
timeline.desc: Comforting, rich Italian Trattoria warmth served up in the cold hills of Nuwara Eliya.

culinary.concept: Savory Mediterranean breakfast moving into comforting, rich Italian Trattoria warmth up in the cold hills.

sections.name: Breakfast Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Gourmet Sea Bass Shakshuka: Eggs slow-poached in a rich, chunked tomato sauce reduced for hours with olive oil, garlic, and sea bass flakes.
Soft-Scramble Tofu Fold: Slow-cooked scrambled eggs whisked continuously with butter cubes and folded with crispy, pan-fried tofu bits.
Pol Rotti Style Flatbread: Hot pan-seared paratha flatbread brushed generously with melted butter, honey, and crushed toasted cashews.

sections.name: Breakfast Sides (Choose 2)
items: Chunky Guacamole: Hand-mashed avocado chunks with fresh lime juice, finely minced sweet onions, and gray sea salt.
Garlic-Tahini Emulsion: Rich raw tahini paste emulsified with freshly squeezed lemon juice, iced water, and a touch of raw garlic.
Artisan Bread & Cream Cheese: Thick-cut fresh bread slices served with premium cream cheese.

sections.name: Breakfast Salad (Choose 1)
items: Rustic Garden Greens: Shredded crunchy lettuce, diced vine tomatoes, fresh cucumber, bell peppers, and green onions with olive oil.
Sweet Poke Bowl Base: Coconut rice or chia base topped with finely diced fresh papaya, mango, and pineapple, garnished with toasted coconut flakes and cashews.
Ribboned Cucumber Ribbon Salad: Thinly shaved fresh cucumbers, dill pickles, and sweet bell peppers in a zesty olive oil dress.

sections.name: Self-Packing Lunch Options
items: Sesame Tuna Tartare (Raw Dish): Pristine cubes of fresh raw tuna tossed gently with toasted sesame oil, organic soy, lime juice, red onion, and coriander.
Deli Hard-Boiled Egg Salad: Hard-boiled egg quarters tossed with finely snipped green onions, rich mayonnaise, and crunched pickles.
Deli Tuna Salad Base: Yellowfin tuna flakes combined with diced bell peppers, onion, tomato, lime juice, and a light olive oil dress.
Fresh Veggie Packing Bar: Crisp cucumber rounds, thick tomato slices, colorful bell pepper strips, and fresh coriander & mint leaves.

sections.name: Dinner Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Trattoria Spaghetti Carbonara: Long pasta tossed off-the-fire with fresh egg yolks, real butter, cracked black pepper, and crispy fried tofu bits.
Choice of Pasta (Alfredo): Penne pasta tossed in a rich, velvety butter, cooking cream, and grated parmesan cheese emulsion with minced garlic.
Sri Lankan Kottu Roti: Godamba roti flatbread strips chopped vigorously on a griddle with cabbage, carrots, leeks, onion, garlic, and curry gravy.

sections.name: Dinner Sides (Choose 2)
items: Short Pasta Pomodoro: Short Italian pasta tossed in a rich, slow-simmered tomato and garlic confit sauce (Napolitano style).
Steamed Jasmine Rice: Hot white rice steamed with a hint of virgin coconut oil.
Roasted Pumpkin Soup: Creamy blended roasted pumpkin with coconut milk and curry powder, served with garlic breadsticks.

sections.name: Dinner Salad (Choose 1)
items: Tuna Panzanella Salad: Seared tuna flakes, bread croutons, green beans, tomato wedges, onion, olives, and iceberg lettuce with Dijon dressing.
Sesame Cucumber Salad: Fresh cucumbers, red onion, and fresh coriander heavily topped with crushed roasted peanuts and sesame oil.
Charred Pineapple Salad: Skillet-seared pineapple cubes and bell pepper strips, served lukewarm over hand-torn greens.

days.title: Tea Country & Scenic Train to Ella

reminders.clothing: Light layers. Modest clothing for public transits.
reminders.footwear: 👟 Comfy walking shoes for the tea plantation walk.

timeline.title: Morning Yoga Session
timeline.desc: Revitalizing yoga in the crisp morning mountain air.

timeline.title: Tea Plantations & Waterfalls
timeline.desc: Tour a historic tea factory, walk the plantation, and sample Ceylon tea. Photo stops at waterfalls.

timeline.title: Scenic Highland Train
timeline.desc: Board the iconic train from Nanu Oya to Ella. 📸 Have camera ready for the train ride!

timeline.title: Ella Check-in
timeline.desc: Check-in at the highly-acclaimed 98 Acres Resort & Spa, nested in green hills.

timeline.title: Shabbat/Communal Dinner at Chabad House
timeline.desc: Group dinner at the Ella Chabad House for a warm, home-cooked meal.

culinary.concept: Hearty, slow-cooked comforting textures perfect for the scenic train journey to Ella.

sections.name: Breakfast Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Spanish Tortilla de Patatas: A thick, rich omelette cooked slowly with olive oil-confit diced potatoes, regular potatoes, and translucent onions.
Super Crispy Lacy Eggs: Two farm eggs fried in smoking hot olive oil to create a deeply crunchy white lace border while keeping the yolk fully liquid.
Your Choice of Eggs: Eggs cooked to order (fried/scrambled/omelet) served with grilled tomato and sautéed mushrooms.

sections.name: Breakfast Sides (Choose 2)
items: Avocado Fan: Fresh avocado fan brushed with fresh lime juice, sea salt, and coarse black pepper.
Garlic-Tahini Spread: Thick, gastronomic raw tahini spread whipped with confit garlic and olive oil.
Baked Beans: Small warm ramekin of sweet and savory baked beans.

sections.name: Breakfast Salad (Choose 1)
items: Vibrant Tomato Medley: Halved cherry tomatoes, sweet bell peppers, and finely chopped onions in extra virgin olive oil.
Sweet Poke Bowl Base: Diced fresh papaya, mango, and pineapple arranged over coconut rice, drizzled with kithul treacle.
Green Lentil Soup: Creamy, partially blended green lentils and coconut milk soup, served warm with garlic breadsticks.

sections.name: Self-Packing Lunch Options
items: Nikkei Tuna/Salmon Tiradito (Raw Dish): Sashimi-style thin slices of fresh raw fish arranged with toasted sesame oil, premium soy, fresh lime juice, and a touch of honey.
Special Vegetable Burger Pattern: Pan-fried potato and carrot-based vegetable patties with a golden outer crust.
Deli Hard-Boiled Egg Halves: Perfect hard-boiled eggs for custom packing.
Fresh Veggie Packing Bar: Crisp carrot batons, red and yellow bell pepper strips, firm cherry tomatoes, and whole lettuce wrappers.

sections.name: The Evening Feast
items: An authentic, warm communal kosher dinner prepared by and served at the Ella Chabad House to comfort the group after arriving in town.

reminders.clothing: Swimwear for the falls, activewear for the zipline.
reminders.footwear: 👟 Sturdy sneakers required for the zipline and falls excursion.

timeline.title: Sunrise Hike & Morning Yoga
timeline.desc: Hike to a nearby peak for sunrise yoga overlooking Ella Gap.

timeline.title: Diyaluma Falls Excursion
timeline.desc: Travel to Sri Lanka's second-highest waterfall. Hike to the upper natural pools for a swim.

timeline.title: Flying Ravana Zipline
timeline.desc: Fly over lush green tea valleys on a dual zip-line reaching speeds of 80km/h.

timeline.title: Ella Town Exploration
timeline.desc: Free time to stroll Ella's bohemian streets, visit cafes, or relax at the spa.

timeline.title: Dinner at Chabad House
timeline.desc: A second night of custom hospitality and communal dinner at the Ella Chabad House.

culinary.concept: Balanced, refreshing textures to support an active day of canyoning, hiking, and ziplining.

sections.name: Breakfast Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Velvety White Shakshuka: Eggs poached gently over a base of mushrooms and onions sautéed in butter, finished with cream cheese and coconut milk.
Omelette aux Fines Herbes: Eggs whisked with plenty of chopped green onions, coriander, bell peppers, and fine broccoli florets, cooked in olive oil.
Continental Breakfast Spread: Assorted fresh breads, Godamba roti flatbreads, wheat tortillas, served with butter and local jams.

sections.name: Breakfast Sides (Choose 2)
items: Avocado Carpaccio: Thinly sliced avocado drizzled with olive oil, coarse sea salt, and black pepper.
Zesty Garlic Tahini: Premium raw tahini whisked with plenty of fresh lime juice and garlic.
Kola Kanda (Herbal Porridge): Traditional green leaf herbal extract blended with soft boiled white rice and coconut milk, served with jaggery.

sections.name: Breakfast Salad (Choose 1)
items: The Ultimate Tropical Harvest: Diced mango, papaya, dragon fruit, and banana with fresh passionfruit pulp and honey.
Bright Cherry Tomato Salad: Halved cherry tomatoes, crisp lettuce, bell peppers, and green onions with a lime-olive oil emulsion.
Pittu Crumb Salad: String Hoppers or Pittu lightly tossed with sweet raisins and kithul treacle.

sections.name: Self-Packing Lunch Options
items: Tuna Pokė Loin Core (Raw Dish): Perfect cubes of pristine raw yellowfin tuna marinated briefly in soy sauce, teriyaki, and a splash of white rice vinegar.
Stir-Fried Asian Egg Salad: Hard-boiled egg salad tossed with green onions, mayonnaise, and a hint of sweet teriyaki sauce.
Savory Poke Bowl Veggie Fillers: Edamame, carrots, radish, cucumber, and pickled ginger.
Fresh Veggie Packing Bar: Diced avocado, grated carrots, fresh cucumber ribbons, chopped lettuce, and sweet bell pepper rings.

sections.name: The Evening Feast
items: A second night of custom hospitality, celebrating the group's final evening in the Ella hill country with a festive dinner at the Chabad House.

reminders.clothing: 👙 Swimwear and sun protection for SUP. 🤍 White/festive modest dress for the Shabbat dinner.

timeline.title: Final Ella Yoga
timeline.desc: Energizing yoga session before checkout.

timeline.title: Transit to Pasikudah Bay
timeline.desc: Scenic drive out of the hills to the pristine beaches of the East Coast.

timeline.title: SUP & Beach Relaxation
timeline.desc: Try Stand-Up Paddleboarding in the calm waters of Pasikudah Bay, or relax on the white sand.

timeline.title: Candle Lighting & Shabbat Prep
timeline.desc: Shabbat preparation at the luxurious Sun Siyam Pasikudah.

timeline.title: Festive Shabbat Dinner
timeline.desc: Traditional Shabbat dinner cooked completely before sunset, held safely on hotplates.

culinary.concept: Transitioning from the high mountains to the East Coast. All hot items are cooked and safely held before candle lighting, delivering a majestic, halakhic Friday night feast.

sections.name: Breakfast Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Air-Whipped Soufflé Pancakes: Fluffy hotcakes topped with real butter and a sweet strawberry jam reduction.
Classic Eggs Benedict: Runny poached eggs over crusty artisan bread, draped in velvety real butter & fresh lime hollandaise.
Vanilla French Toast: Thick bread soaked in an egg, milk, and vanilla wash, pan-fried in butter with strawberry jam.

sections.name: Breakfast Sides (Choose 2)
items: Cloud-Whipped Tahini: Premium raw tahini emulsified with iced water, crushed garlic, and lime juice.
Pan-Blistered Sweet Potatoes: Fresh local sweet potato chunks pan-seared with cold-pressed olive oil & dried herbs.
Garlic Confit Spread: Sweet garlic confit cloves whipped with olive oil.

sections.name: Breakfast Salad (Choose 1)
items: Bright Cherry Tomato Salad: Halved cherry tomatoes, crisp lettuce, bell peppers, and green onions with a lime-olive oil emulsion.
The Ultimate Tropical Harvest: Diced mango, papaya, dragon fruit, and banana with fresh passionfruit pulp and honey.
Porridge with Oats: Warm oats boiled in coconut milk, topped with chopped dates and roasted peanuts.

sections.name: Self-Packing Lunch Options
items: Coastal Tuna/Salmon Ceviche (Raw Dish): Cubes of fresh raw fish cured instantly in sharp lime juice, cold-pressed olive oil, red onion, and coriander.
Deli Hard-Boiled Egg Salad: Chopped hard-boiled eggs in rich mayonnaise, mustard, and micro-diced bell peppers.
Special Vegetable Burger Patties: Pan-fried potato and carrot-based vegetable patties.
Fresh Veggie Packing Bar: Crisp colorful bell pepper strips, firm cherry tomato halves, cool cucumber wheels, and crunchy carrot batons.

sections.name: Hot Fish Main Courses (Cooked Pre-Shabbat)
items: Herb-Crusted Seared Cod: Thick white fish fillets cooked under a tight seal in rich olive oil, garlic confit, broccoli, and white wine vinegar.
Claypot Fish Curry (Sri Lankan Style): Chunks of local Seer or Tuna slow-cooked in rich coconut milk curry sauce with mustard seeds.
Garlic Butter Sea Bass: Tender Sea Bass fillets bathed in a hot reduction of melted butter, crushed garlic, and fresh local herbs.

sections.name: Hot Side Dishes
items: Silk Mashed Potatoes: Velvety regular potatoes creamed with butter and hot milk.
Short Pasta Pomodoro: Pasta tossed in a rich, slow-simmered tomato and garlic reduction (Napolitano style).
Aromatic Coconut Rice: Fluffy white rice cooked in diluted coconut milk with pandan aromas.

sections.name: Accompanying Shabbat Salads & Dips (Cold)
items: Festive Avocado, Tomato & Pepper Salad: Cherry tomatoes, colorful bell peppers, diced avocado, red onion, and black olives in an herb-olive oil marinade.
Sweet Mango-Pineapple Salad: Fresh mango and pineapple chunks served over crisp lettuce with fresh coriander and red onion.
Fresh bakery baskets, whipped tahini, and sweet local jams.

reminders.footwear: Barefoot or light beach sandals. 💤 Pure relaxation day. No digital active tasks needed.

timeline.title: Shabbat Coffee & Pastries
timeline.desc: Pre-set hot tea or coffee (urn) with wafers, cakes, and gourmet cookies.

timeline.title: Refreshing Kiddush
timeline.desc: Grazing station of sliced tropical fruits, fresh veggies, tahini, and sweet buns.

timeline.title: Shabbat Lunch Buffet
timeline.desc: Cold grand buffet featuring Tuna Poke, Egg/Avocado Terrine, and Tuna Confit platters.

timeline.title: Mini Seudah Shlishit
timeline.desc: Third Shabbat meal featuring fresh fruits, raw veggies, guacamole, crackers, and sweets.

timeline.title: Havdalah Ceremony
timeline.desc: Havdalah marking the end of Shabbat.

timeline.title: Motzash Dinner
timeline.desc: Celebratory hot dinner featuring seared tuna, claypot curries, or pesto pasta.

culinary.concept: Strict adherence to Shabbat halakha with zero active heating or electricity adjustments. A highly sophisticated, completely cold/room-temperature 5-star brunch and lunch spread.

sections.name: 08:00 AM Coffee Sweet Accents
items: Assorted fresh cakes, Manner wafers, Nutella biscuits, and gourmet chocolates.
Pre-set hot premium Ceylon Tea or Nescafé Coffee (via hot water urn set before Shabbat).

sections.name: 10:00 AM Kiddush Grazing Station
items: Freshly sliced local tropical fruits (Mango, Pineapple, Papaya), crisp cucumber rounds, sweet cherry tomatoes, bell peppers, and creamy garlic-lime Tahini.
Bakery Basket: Cookies, local sweet buns, halawa with pistachio, and premium sweets.

sections.name: Gourmet Cold Proteins
items: Pristine Yellowfin Tuna Pokė & Sashimi Display: Chilled raw tuna cuts marinated cleanly in organic soy, toasted sesame oil, ginger, and fresh lime juice.
Layered Egg, Tomato & Avocado Terrine: An elegant cold sliced terrine of chopped eggs, premium mayonnaise, vine tomatoes, and smooth avocado cream.
Chef’s Tuna Confit & Smoked-Style Salmon Platter: Plated flakes of deep olive oil tuna, cured local fish, served with red onion, pickles, and Happy Cow cream cheese.

sections.name: Salads & Desserts
items: Deluxe Tuna Panzanella: Crisp bread croutons, flaked tuna, green beans, cherry tomatoes, purple onion, and olives in a tangy olive oil dress.
Tropical Crunch Salad with Honey-Tahini: Crunchy lettuce, diced mango, avocado, grated carrots, and sweet corn topped with a sweet-and-savory lime tahini drizzle.
Cold Spinach & Cashew Pesto Pasta: Short pasta tossed in spinach and cashew pesto, topped with crispy tofu bits and crushed peanuts.
Desserts: Coconut-cooked rice cubes (Kiri Bath) with kithul treacle, chunks of halawa with pistachio, banana-strawberry skewers, and Nutella biscuits.

sections.name: 06:00 PM Third Shabbat Meal
items: Beautifully presented platters of sliced fresh tropical fruits and crisp raw vegetables. Served alongside whipped avocado guacamole, raw tahini, cream cheese, crackers, and traditional sweet delicacies.

sections.name: 09:00 PM Motzash Hot Dinner (Active Cooking)
items: Seared Yellowfin Tuna Steak: Tuna heavily coated with cracked black pepper, hard-seared exactly 1-2 minutes per side for a rare center, served with orange glaze.
Gourmet Sri Lankan Curry: Chunks of local fish or whole mushrooms slow-simmered in a rich, clay-pot style curry coconut milk broth, served with crisp papadams.
Penne with Spinach Pesto: Penne pasta tossed in a rich, homemade smooth spinach, cashew, garlic, parmesan, and olive oil pesto.
Sides: Shoestring Pommes Frites, Steamed Jasmine Rice, Fluffed Herb Couscous.
Salad: Warm Sweet Potato Salad, Sautéed Mushroom Salad, Blanched Baby Corn Salad.

reminders.clothing: Swimwear, sun protection. Modest clothing for town stroll.
reminders.footwear: 🤿 Snorkeling gear ready. Optional dolphin watching requires payment on-site.

timeline.title: Morning Yoga
timeline.desc: Beachfront yoga to prepare for marine exploration.

timeline.title: Excursion to Trincomalee
timeline.desc: Drive to Trincomalee, home to one of the world's deepest natural harbors.

timeline.title: Snorkeling at Pigeon Island
timeline.desc: Snorkel among live coral reefs, sea turtles, and blacktip reef sharks.

timeline.title: Trinco Town & Local Shopping
timeline.desc: Explore historical temples, visit local markets, and buy local handicrafts.

timeline.title: Marine Wildlife Safari
timeline.desc: Optional whale and dolphin watching in the open ocean (paid on-site).

timeline.title: Resort Dinner
timeline.desc: Return to Pasikudah for our farewell coastal seafood feast.

culinary.concept: Clean, high-protein Tokyo Poke and fresh coastal elements to power up ocean snorkeling.

sections.name: Breakfast Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Gourmet Sea Bass Shakshuka: Eggs slow-poached in a rich, chunked tomato sauce reduced for hours with olive oil, garlic, and sea bass flakes.
Spanish Tortilla de Patatas: A thick, rich omelette cooked slowly with olive oil-confit diced potatoes, regular potatoes, and translucent onions.
Coconut & Banana Crêpe: Delicate pancake filled with butter & honey caramelized bananas.

sections.name: Breakfast Sides (Choose 2)
items: Avocado Fan: Fresh avocado fan brushed with fresh lime juice, sea salt, and coarse black pepper.
Stuffed Avocado Boats: Half-avocados filled with micro-diced cherry tomatoes, extra virgin olive oil, and sea salt.
Baked Beans: Small warm ramekin of sweet and savory baked beans.

sections.name: Breakfast Salad & Poke
items: Sweet Poke Bowl Base (Treacle Drizzle): Diced fresh papaya, mango, and pineapple arranged over coconut rice, drizzled with kithul treacle.
Exotic Fruit Platter: Slices of fresh mango, pineapple, papaya, and local banana with fresh passionfruit seeds & honey.
Pittu Crumb Salad: String Hoppers or Pittu lightly tossed with sweet raisins and kithul treacle.

sections.name: Self-Packing Lunch Options
items: Tuna Pokė Loin Core (Raw Dish): Perfect cubes of pristine raw yellowfin tuna marinated briefly in soy sauce, teriyaki, and a splash of white rice vinegar.
Chef’s Tuna Confit Salad: Flaky tuna chunks slow-infused with deep olive oil, green onions, and grated carrots.
Deli Hard-Boiled Egg Halves: Perfect hard-boiled eggs for custom packing.
Fresh Veggie Packing Bar: Crisp cucumber rounds, thick tomato slices, colorful bell pepper strips, and fresh coriander & mint leaves.

sections.name: Dinner Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Wok-Tossed Egg Noodles: Noodles flash-fried at high heat with sesame oil, soy sauce, carrots, and peppers, marbled with a whisked egg.
Gourmet Chili Fish: Thick chunks of local white fish or tuna stir-fried in a rich, sweet-and-spicy garlic-chili glaze.
Sea Bass 'En Papillote' (Skillet-Style): White fish fillet slow-cooked in a sealed parchment pouch with olive oil, garlic, and broccoli.

sections.name: Dinner Sides & Salads
items: Sides: Garlic Confit Pasta, Steamed Jasmine Rice, Skillet Potato Crisps.
Salad: Sesame Cucumber Salad, Blanched Baby Corn Salad, Warm Mushroom & Tomato Salad.

reminders.clothing: Comfortable clothes for the long highway drive.

timeline.title: Morning Yoga
timeline.desc: Final East Coast yoga session.

timeline.title: Breakfast & Checkout
timeline.desc: Enjoy a final beachfront breakfast before heading inland.

timeline.title: Transit to Colombo
timeline.desc: Drive back across the island to the capital city (approx. 5.5 hours).

timeline.title: Hotel Check-in & Settle In
timeline.desc: Check-in at our Colombo Boutique Hotel.

timeline.title: Clay-Pot Dinner in Colombo
timeline.desc: Rich, comforting clay-pot curry served at the boutique hotel.

culinary.concept: Fresh Mediterranean morning tones dropping into rich, clay-pot curry comfort down in the city.

sections.name: Breakfast Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Omelette aux Fines Herbes: Eggs whisked with green onions, coriander, bell peppers, and broccoli florets, cooked in olive oil.
Pol Rotti Style Flatbread: Hot paratha flatbread brushed with butter, honey, and cashews.
Mediterranean Eggs: Poached eggs over local bread with caramelized onions, sun-dried tomatoes, feta, and parsley.

items: Sides: Zesty Garlic Tahini, Avocado Carpaccio, Kola Kanda (Herbal Porridge).
Salad: A Gardener's Love Salad, Sweet Poke Bowl Base (Coconut Rice), Shredded Cucumber & Dill Pickle.

sections.name: Self-Packing Lunch Options
items: Asian Tuna Tartare (Raw Dish): Pristine cubes of fresh raw tuna tossed gently with toasted sesame oil, organic soy, lime juice, red onion, and coriander.
Balsamic Grilled Veggie Base: Thinly sliced bell peppers, onions, and carrots tossed with olive oil and balsamic, pan-grilled.
Cheese & Veggie Club Base: Premium cheese slices, white bread, and traditional savory accompaniments.
Fresh Veggie Packing Bar: Crisp carrot batons, red and yellow bell pepper strips, firm cherry tomatoes, and whole lettuce wrappers.

sections.name: Dinner Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Gourmet Sri Lankan Curry: Chunks of local fish slow-simmered in a rich, clay-pot style curry coconut milk broth, served with crisp papadams.
Yellow Fin Tuna with Cauliflower Gratin: Pan-seared tuna steak served alongside a baked, cheesy cauliflower gratin and salsa verde.
Spaghetti al Ragù de Tofu: Long pasta smothered in a rich, slow-cooked ragout made of finely minced tofu simmered in tomatoes.

sections.name: Dinner Sides & Salads
items: Sides: Coconut-Steamed Rice, Fluffed Herb Couscous, Roasted Pumpkin Soup.
Salad: Tuna Panzanella Salad, Tropical Mango & Avocado Salad, Double-Texture Tomato Salad.

reminders.clothing: Comfortable clothes for the long overnight flight. Pack all luggage securely before the drive.

timeline.title: Final Hotel Breakfast
timeline.desc: Enjoy a final boutique breakfast before city exploration.

timeline.title: City Exploration & Shopping
timeline.desc: Last-minute souvenir shopping around Colombo markets and boutique shops.

timeline.title: Picnic Lunch on the Road
timeline.desc: Enjoy our packed custom picnic lunch.

timeline.title: Gourmet Kosher Dinner
timeline.desc: A spectacular, fully kosher meat dinner catered directly from Chabad Colombo to conclude the journey.

timeline.title: Airport Transfers
timeline.desc: Drop-off at Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB) for departure flights.

culinary.concept: Final hotel gourmet morning, custom packed lunch for the city exploration, and a spectacular, fully kosher meat finale.

sections.name: Breakfast Main Course (Choose 1)
items: Super Crispy Lacy Eggs: Two farm eggs fried in smoking hot olive oil to create a deeply crunchy white lace border.
French Mushroom Omelette: Silky omelette rolled with butter-sautéed mushrooms and cream cheese.
Continental Breakfast Spread: Assorted fresh breads, Godamba roti flatbreads, wheat tortillas, served with butter and local jams.

sections.name: Breakfast Sides & Salads
items: Sides: Smashed Guacamole, Garlic-Tahini Spread, Toasted Artisan Bread with Kotmale butter.
Salad: Vibrant Tomato Medley, The Ultimate Tropical Harvest, Coconut Oatmeal Porridge.

sections.name: Gourmet Picnic Selections (Choose Your Base)
items: The Ultimate Tuna Club Sandwich: Flaked grilled tuna mixed with finely diced bell peppers, onion, tomato, lime, and mayonnaise.
Stir-Fried Asian Egg Wrap: Hard-boiled egg salad tossed with green onions, mayonnaise, and teriyaki wrapped in a wheat tortilla.

sections.name: Salads & Sides
items: Salads: Sweet Mango-Pineapple Salad, Charred Pineapple & Bell Pepper Mix.
Accents: Diced avocado boxes, grated carrots, fresh cucumber ribbons, bell pepper rings, and assorted crackers.

sections.name: The Evening Spread
items: A premium, fully kosher meat dinner catered directly from Chabad Colombo to perfectly conclude your magnificent 10-day island journey before the flight home.
